# FutureMarketingAI (FMai)

> FMai is a Dutch AI marketing partnership for performance and growth agencies. Clyde, the AI Marketing Medewerker (Employee), runs 12 skills (9 live, 3 coming soon) across brand workspace portfolios with per-brand memory isolation. Workspace-priced model since 2026-04-28: Founding Member 997 EUR per month, lifetime rate lock (10 spots, 1 taken), Growth 499 EUR per workspace (2 to 4 brands), Professional 399 EUR per workspace (5 to 14 brands), Enterprise 299 EUR per workspace (15 plus brands). Max 20 new partnerships per year. EU-native, AVG and EU AI Act ready. Application-gated: no self-service signup. Canonical: https://future-marketing.ai. Founder: Daley. Languages: Dutch (source), English, Spanish. Pricing canon: fma-app/src/lib/skills.ts revision 2026-04-28.

## Company

FutureMarketingAI (FMai) is a solo-founder AI marketing partnership founded by Daley. The product was repositioned in April 2026 from a services agency to a high-touch partnership platform. Headquartered in the Netherlands, serving EU agencies. EU AI Act compliant ahead of the August 2026 deadline.

Unlike a self-serve SaaS, FMai operates on a 20-partnerships-per-year cap with application-gated onboarding. Every engagement starts with the Apply form at https://future-marketing.ai/nl/apply and is reviewed by Daley personally within 48 hours. This is deliberate: quality of partnership is the product.

The proof case is SkinClarity Club, a Dutch beauty brand where Sindy (founder) operates 4 brands and 3 Instagram accounts with 6 of Clyde's 12 skills active. Sindy is the first Founding Member (spot 1 of 10).

Key facts:

- Brand: FMai (FutureMarketingAI)
- Canonical website: https://future-marketing.ai
- Founder: Daley
- Location: Netherlands (EU)
- Languages: Dutch (source of truth), English, Spanish
- Company type: Solo founder AI marketing partnership
- Target market: Performance and growth agencies in NL and EU managing 10 to 50 brand portfolios
- Compliance: AVG (GDPR) by design, EU AI Act ready, self-hosted EU infrastructure

## Product: Clyde, the AI Marketing Medewerker

Clyde is a persistent AI employee, not a chatbot. Key characteristics:

- Named identity across every touchpoint (website, Slack, dashboard, email).
- Persistent 4-layer memory per brand: hot cache (today), working memory (this month), archive (history), and "who the brand is" (identity consolidation via nightly dream process).
- Operates 12 skills: Social Media, Blog Factory, Ad Creator, Reel Builder, Voice Agent, Lead Qualifier, Email Management, ManyChat DM, Reporting, SEO/GEO, Research, and the Clyde orchestrator.
- Per-brand isolation via Supabase Row Level Security. No cross-brand leakage.
- Self-hosted EU infrastructure for AVG and EU AI Act compliance.
- Controlled via natural language through chat, Slack, Telegram, or direct dashboard commands.

## The 12 Skills

### Social Media Manager (Live)

The Social Media Manager runs the full content process from idea to publication. AI analyzes trending topics, generates captions in the right brand voice, schedules posts at optimal times and tracks engagement metrics. Suitable for Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn.

Capabilities:
- AI-generated captions in brand voice
- Multi-platform scheduling with optimal timing
- Content calendar with drag and drop
- Engagement tracking per post
- Carousel and story builder
- Hashtag research and optimization

Credit cost: 1 to 2 credits per post.

### Blog Factory (Live)

Blog Factory produces SEO-optimized longform articles from research to publish. Keyword research, writing in brand voice, meta descriptions, heading structure, internal linking, all automatic. Output: 1,500 to 3,000 words ready to publish.

Capabilities:
- Keyword research and topic clustering
- Longform articles (1,500-3,000 words)
- SEO optimization (meta tags, headings, internal links)
- Automatic publication to website
- Brand voice consistency

Credit cost: 15 credits per article. Each workspace receives 800 credits per month (Founding Member: 8000 credits total).

### Ad Creator (Coming soon)

Ad Creator generates complete advertisements from copy to visuals. AI builds static and video ads, optimizes for different formats (Stories, Feed, Reels) and publishes directly to Meta Ads Manager. A/B test variants included.

Capabilities:
- AI-generated ad copy and visuals
- Static and video ad creation
- Multi-format output (Stories, Feed, Reels)
- Competitor ad library research
- Direct publishing to Meta Ads
- A/B test variant generation

Credit cost: 10 credits per static ad, 20 credits per video ad. Status: coming soon.

### Reel Builder (Coming soon)

Reel Builder creates short vertical videos (9:16 aspect) with AI, including captions, music and transitions. Ideal for Instagram Reels, TikTok and YouTube Shorts. From script to publish-ready video.

Capabilities:
- AI-generated video scripts
- Automatic caption generation
- Music selection and timing
- Vertical format (9:16) optimization
- Template library for fast creation

Credit cost: 25 credits per reel. Status: coming soon.

### Voice Agent (Coming soon)

The Voice Agent handles phone traffic with AI, both inbound and outbound. Books appointments, answers FAQs, logs conversations and escalates to a human when needed. Fully customizable per client (voice, personality, knowledge base). Built on ElevenLabs voice technology.

Capabilities:
- Inbound and outbound AI phone calls
- Automatic appointment booking
- FAQ answering in natural language
- Conversation logging and transcripts
- Escalation to human agent
- Campaign management for outbound calls

Credit cost: 5 credits per minute. Status: coming soon.

### Lead Qualifier (Live)

The Lead Qualifier places an AI chatbot on your website that qualifies visitors, scores them based on intent and behavior, and automatically routes warm leads to your CRM or sales team.

Capabilities:
- Embeddable AI chatbot for websites
- Automatic lead scoring
- CRM routing based on qualification
- Conversation analytics
- Custom qualification criteria per client

Credit cost: 2 credits per scored conversation.

### Email Management (Live)

Email Management connects to Gmail and Outlook (Microsoft 365) via OAuth. AI classifies inboxes into 6 categories (lead, urgent client, invoice, newsletter, internal, other), auto-provisions FMai labels and folders, and generates AI-reply drafts for your approval before sending. Saves hours per week on inbox management. Dual-write organization keeps both Outlook (category plus folder) and Gmail (nested label) mailboxes tidy.

Capabilities:
- Gmail and Outlook (Microsoft 365) OAuth integration
- AI inbox classification (lead, urgent, invoice, newsletter, internal)
- Auto-provisioning of FMai labels and folders
- AI reply drafts with approval queue
- Brand-voice per client
- Round-trip send via mailbox-native API
- Approval audit log

Credit cost: 5 credits per action. Brand-voice learns from your corrections per client.

### ManyChat DM (Live)

ManyChat DM Automation responds automatically to Instagram DMs with AI-generated answers. Set keyword triggers, capture leads and route warm prospects to your CRM or sales team.

Capabilities:
- Keyword-based DM triggers
- AI-generated replies in brand voice
- Lead capture and CRM routing
- Conversation flows with branching
- Performance analytics per trigger

Credit cost: 2 credits per 10 DMs.

### Reporting and Analytics (Live)

Reporting and Analytics delivers automatic dashboards, weekly digests and real-time KPI tracking. The system detects anomalies in your data and proactively alerts you when metrics deviate.

Capabilities:
- Automatic weekly performance digests
- Real-time KPI dashboards
- Anomaly detection with alerts
- Cross-platform analytics (social, web, sales)
- Custom report generation

Credit cost: 5 credits per report.

### SEO / GEO Analyst (Live)

The SEO/GEO Analyst runs automatic SEO audits, tracks keyword rankings, monitors Core Web Vitals and tracks how often your brand is cited by AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews). Actionable fixes prioritized.

Capabilities:
- Automatic technical SEO audits
- Keyword ranking tracking
- Core Web Vitals monitoring
- AI citation monitoring (GEO)
- Competitor keyword analysis
- Prioritized fix recommendations

Credit cost: 5 credits per audit, 3 credits per report.

### Research (Live)

The Research skill runs continuous market research, monitors trends in your niche and analyzes competitors. AI searches sources, synthesizes insights and delivers actionable recommendations directly in your dashboard, with source citations on every insight.

Capabilities:
- Automated market research
- Trend monitoring in your niche
- Competitor analysis with benchmarks
- Actionable insights and recommendations
- Source citations on every insight

Credit cost: 3 credits per query.

### Clyde Orchestrator (Live)

Clyde is the central AI employee who routes all other skills. Give instructions in natural language and Clyde routes to the right skill. Works through chat, Slack, Telegram and other channels. Has memory per client and remembers earlier conversations, preferences and context.

Capabilities:
- Natural language commands
- Orchestration of all other skills
- Multi-channel (chat, Slack, Telegram)
- Memory and context per client
- Knowledge base with search
- Routines and recurring tasks

Credit cost: 1 to 5 credits per chat.

## Tiers and Pricing

All prices in EUR per month excluding VAT unless stated. Workspace-priced model since 2026-04-28. Pricing canon: `fma-app/src/lib/skills.ts`. Workspace tariffs are recalibrated every 6 months based on observed credit usage. Existing contracts are not retroactively adjusted.

Two pricing models:
- Fixed: Founding Member only. Single monthly price, single credit allocation.
- Workspace: monthly price equals pricePerWorkspace times workspaces. Credits scale with workspaces (creditsPerWorkspace times workspaces).

### Founding Member, 997 EUR per month, lifetime rate lock

- 10 spots total, 1 currently taken (SkinClarity Club)
- Unlimited workspaces (no cap)
- 8,000 credits per month
- All 12 skills included (9 live, 3 coming soon)
- Direct founder access plus roadmap influence
- No onboarding fee
- Monthly cancellable; rate locked for life (never raises for founding members)
- Mathematical advantage over workspace pricing kicks in from 3 brands (997 vs 1497 at Growth 499 times 3)

### Growth, 499 EUR per workspace

- 2 to 4 brand workspaces
- 800 credits per workspace per month (1600 to 3200 total)
- All 12 skills included
- 1,997 EUR one-time onboarding
- Email support

### Professional, 399 EUR per workspace

- 5 to 14 brand workspaces
- 800 credits per workspace per month (4000 to 11200 total)
- All 12 skills included
- 3,997 EUR one-time onboarding
- Dedicated Slack channel

### Enterprise, 299 EUR per workspace

- 15 plus brand workspaces (no upper cap)
- 800 credits per workspace per month (12000 plus total)
- All 12 skills included
- 5,997 EUR one-time onboarding
- Dedicated Customer Success Manager

### Credit packs (all tiers)

- Boost: 2,000 credits, 149 EUR
- Scale: 5,000 credits, 297 EUR
- Max: 15,000 credits, 697 EUR

## Case Study: SkinClarity Club

Client: SkinClarity Club, a Dutch beauty and skincare operation (DTC plus physical clinic). Founder and operator: Sindy.

Setup: SkinClarity Club runs a portfolio of 4 brand identities across 3 Instagram accounts, each with its own audience and house style.
- @SkinClarityClub: main account, treatments, tips and skin knowledge for consumers (circa 50 percent of content volume).
- @Sindy_Huidtherapeut: personal authority account of founder Sindy, trust, expertise, personal branding (circa 30 percent of content volume).
- @SkinClarity_Shop: product account for the webshop, launches, bundles and product content (circa 20 percent of content volume).

Active skills: 6 of Clyde's 12 skills active for SKC.
- Social Media Manager: carousels, posts and stories for 3 Instagram accounts. AI-generated in the right brand voice per account.
- Blog Factory: SEO blogs for skinclarityclub.nl. Skin themes, treatments and product deep dives.
- SEO / GEO Analyst: technical SEO audits, position tracking and citation monitoring in ChatGPT and Perplexity.
- Reporting and Analytics: weekly performance digest across Instagram, Shopify and SEO data. Anomaly alerts.
- Research: trend monitoring in skincare, competitor analysis and content ideas with source citations.
- Clyde orchestrator: the central AI Marketing Medewerker that ties the 5 skills together. Memory per account plus learning across skills.

Architecture: One Clyde, 3 workspaces (one per account), shared portfolio memory. Content is approved by Sindy before it is published.

Output (autonomous, weekly):
- Carousels: circa 21 per week
- Instagram posts: circa 15 per week
- Stories: on demand
- Blog articles: 2 to 4 per month
- SEO reports: weekly
- Performance digest: Monday 08:00

Timeline:
- Week 1: onboarding (brand voice per account, approval workflow, KPI definitions).
- Month 1: first full week autonomous, lots of feedback, Clyde calibrates.
- Month 3: approval time per post drops from 4 minutes to 30 seconds. Clyde knows the small preferences.
- Now: fully autonomous across 3 accounts and 4 brands. Sindy reviews, Clyde executes.

Testimonial: "Clyde beheert onze volledige social-contentoperatie over 3 Instagram-accounts en 4 merken. Wat eerst een hele middag per week kostte, draait nu autonoom op de achtergrond. Ik beoordeel, Clyde voert uit." Sindy, founder SkinClarity Club.

## Memory Architecture

Clyde's 4-layer memory is the USP that separates a partnership from generic AI tools. Per-brand isolation via Supabase Row Level Security. No cross-brand leakage.

Layer 1, Today (hot cache): every interaction within the current 24-hour window, immediately addressable. Used for "the post we just discussed" or "remember the angle from this morning."

Layer 2, This month (working memory): rolling 30-day context. Recent campaigns, recent feedback, recent performance signals. The texture of "how things are going right now."

Layer 3, Archive (history): every prior interaction, indexed and searchable but not always loaded. Pulled in when relevance is high or when the user asks about something old.

Layer 4, Who the brand is (identity): consolidated brand essence. Voice rules, audience persona, what works and what does not. Distilled overnight via the dream process from the layers above. This is what makes Clyde act like a brand insider rather than a generic tool.

Dream consolidation: nightly, Clyde re-reads the working memory and the latest archive entries and updates the identity layer. Connections that survive multiple nights become part of "who the brand is." Stale or contradicted entries fade.

Data export and deletion: 24-hour SLA on full export or full deletion on request. AVG (GDPR) compliant by design.

## How it Works

Application-gated, no self-service signup. Max 20 partnerships per year.

Step 1, Apply (5 min): submit the Apply form at https://future-marketing.ai/nl/apply. 8 fields: name, email, agency, role, revenue band, client count, preferred tier, problem statement.

Step 2, Founder Review (within 48 hours): Daley personally reviews every application. If accepted, he schedules a 30-minute Strategy Call.

Step 3, Strategy Call (30 min): honest assessment of which tier and skills deliver the most impact. We assess your client portfolio and pick the right starting setup.

Step 4, Onboarding (week 1): we connect brand voice, social accounts, knowledge bases and configure Clyde for each client.

Step 5, Correction Loop (month 1): Clyde calibrates on real feedback. Many corrections in week 1, fewer by week 4. By month 3 the approval time per post drops from 4 minutes to 30 seconds.

Step 6, Quarterly Strategy plus Annual Retrospective: quarterly check-ins on what is working. Annual retrospective with full performance review.

## Founder

Daley is the solo founder of FutureMarketingAI. Native Dutch speaker, based in the Netherlands. Technical builder who personally architects every system. Every partnership is reviewed by Daley directly. Contact: hello@future-marketing.ai. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/futuremarketingai.

## Compliance and Trust

- AVG (GDPR) compliant by design. Per-brand data isolation via Supabase Row Level Security.
- EU AI Act transparency obligations met (chatbot identifies as AI, voice agent greeting identifies as AI).
- Self-hosted EU infrastructure (Hetzner Amsterdam region).
- 24-hour data export and deletion SLA.
- No data leaves the EU for training or inference.
- DPA (Data Processing Agreement) available on request.
- DPIA (Data Protection Impact Assessment) covers all 6 active skill categories.

## Kennisbank / Resources

Hub: https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank -- GEO, AI marketing automation, agency-ops en product-Clyde cornerstones (15 artikelen, juni 2026).

### Pillars

- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/geo-generative-engine-optimization -- Wat is GEO? Generative Engine Optimization uitgelegd: hoe AI-engines zoals ChatGPT, Perplexity en Google AI Overviews jouw merk citeren en hoe je begint.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/ai-marketing-automation-voor-bureaus -- AI marketing automation voor bureaus: de complete gids over hoe een AI Marketing Medewerker bureaus laat schalen over meerdere merken zonder evenredige headcount-groei.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/marketingbureau-schalen-met-ai -- Marketingbureau schalen met AI: het operating model dat de lineaire relatie tussen omzet en headcount doorbreekt.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/ai-marketing-medewerker -- AI Marketing Medewerker als productcategorie: autonomie, merkgeheugen en vaardigheden in een digitale collega, met Clyde als implementatie.

### Clusters

- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/geo-vs-seo-waar-investeren-2026 -- GEO vs SEO in 2026: waarin de twee strategieen verschillen, waarom GEO SEO uitbreidt en niet vervangt, en hoe je budget verstandig te verdelen.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/zichtbaarheid-meten-ai-overviews -- Hoe je zichtbaarheid in AI Overviews meet: citatiegraad, AI share of voice, merkvermeldingen versus citaties en AI-verwezen verkeer per engine.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/geo-monitoring-tools-chatgpt-perplexity -- GEO monitoring tools voor ChatGPT en Perplexity: een gegronde vergelijking van het GEO-monitoring-landschap voor 2026.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/wat-is-een-ai-marketing-medewerker -- Wat is een AI Marketing Medewerker? Clyde uitgelegd: een persistente AI-partner met langetermijngeheugen die marketingvaardigheden uitvoert als digitale collega voor bureaus.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/clyde-vs-jasper-chatgpt-semrush -- Clyde vs Jasper vs ChatGPT vs Semrush: welke te kiezen als bureau dat marketing wil schalen over meerdere merken.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/ai-efficientie-marketingbureau -- AI efficientie voor bureaus: welk werk AI als eerste overneemt en hoe een AI Marketing Medewerker met merkgeheugen het volume draagt.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/meetbare-ai-marketing-resultaten -- Meetbare AI marketing ROI: een framework met nulmeting en zes KPI-indicatoren voor bureaus die resultaat willen verdedigen tegenover hun merken.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/ai-marketing-resultaat-in-de-praktijk -- AI marketing in de praktijk: een werkend voorbeeld van hoe een AI Marketing Medewerker per merk werk levert terwijl de operator regie houdt.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/ai-agent-vs-ai-tool-marketing -- AI agent vs AI tool in marketing: het echte verschil in werkmodel, autonomie en geheugen, en wanneer je welke nodig hebt.
- https://future-marketing.ai/nl/kennisbank/ai-marketing-agent-geheugen-en-leren -- Geheugen en leren van een AI marketing agent: hoe per-merk langetermijngeheugen per-merk-personalisatie mogelijk maakt en de kern-USP van Clyde is.

## Apply

Start at https://future-marketing.ai/nl/apply. 8-field application form (name, email, agency, role, revenue band, client count, preferred tier, problem statement). Review within 48 hours by Daley personally. If accepted, Daley schedules a 30-minute strategy call. Then 4-week onboarding to connect brand voice, accounts, and skills.

- Privacy inquiries: privacy@future-marketing.ai (legal page only)

Content is authored in Dutch and translated to English and Spanish by native or senior-native translators. NL is the source of truth.

## HowTo: Start met FutureMarketingAI

Type: HowTo
Name: Hoe start ik met FutureMarketingAI?
Description: Stap-voor-stap handleiding om als marketingbureau of brand-operator van aanvraag tot volledig autonoom werkende AI Marketing Medewerker te komen.
TotalTime: PT4W

Step 1 - Dien je aanvraag in (5 minuten)
Ga naar https://future-marketing.ai/nl/apply en vul het aanvraagformulier in. Je hebt alleen je naam, e-mailadres en eventueel je bedrijfsnaam nodig. Extra context over je portfolio en doelen is welkom maar niet verplicht.

Step 2 - Persoonlijke beoordeling door Daley (binnen 48 uur)
Daley beoordeelt elke aanvraag persoonlijk. Als er een goede match is, plant hij direct een Strategy Call in. Geen automatische afwijzingen, geen verkoopscript.

Step 3 - Strategy Call (30 minuten)
Een eerlijk gesprek over welk tier en welke vaardigheden het meeste impact hebben voor jouw portfolio. We kiezen de juiste startopzet samen.

Step 4 - Onboarding (week 1)
We koppelen merkstem, social-accounts, kennisbases en configureren Clyde voor elk klantmerk. Geen technische kennis vereist van jouw kant.

Step 5 - Correctielus (maand 1)
Clyde calibreert op echte feedback. In week 1 veel correcties, in week 4 bijna geen meer. Tegen maand 3 daalt de goedkeuringstijd per post van 4 minuten naar 30 seconden.

Step 6 - Kwartaalcheck en jaarlijkse retrospective
Elk kwartaal een strategisch gesprek over wat werkt. Jaarlijks een volledige performance review met roadmap-update.

## FAQPage: Veelgestelde vragen over FutureMarketingAI

Type: FAQPage
URL: https://future-marketing.ai

Q: Wat kost FutureMarketingAI?
A: Founding Member kost 997 EUR per maand, levenslang vast tarief (rate lock for life), maandelijks opzegbaar (10 plekken, 1 bezet). Growth kost 499 euro per workspace per maand (2 tot 4 merken). Professional kost 399 euro per workspace per maand (5 tot 14 merken). Enterprise kost 299 euro per workspace per maand (15 of meer merken). Prijzen worden halfjaarlijks herzien. Geen verborgen kosten, geen opzetkosten voor Founding.

Q: Kan ik stoppen wanneer ik wil?
A: Ja. Alle tiers, inclusief Founding, zijn maandelijks opzegbaar. Founding is geen eenmalige betaling maar een maandelijks abonnement met een levenslang vast tarief: je betaalt altijd 997 EUR per maand, het tarief stijgt nooit.

Q: Voor welke bureaus is FutureMarketingAI geschikt?
A: Voor performance- en groeibureaus in Nederland en de EU die 2 tot 50 klantmerken beheren. Het model is ontworpen voor operators die kwaliteit belangrijker vinden dan schaal en die bereid zijn Clyde te laten leren in maand 1.

Q: Hoelang duurt de onboarding?
A: Week 1 is technische onboarding (koppeling accounts, merkstem, kennisbases). Maand 1 is de correctielus. Volledig autonoom werken begint meestal in maand 2.

Q: Is mijn data veilig?
A: Ja. Per-merk data-isolatie via Supabase Row Level Security. Geen cross-brand lekkage. Zelfgehoste EU-infrastructuur (Hetzner Amsterdam). Voldoet aan AVG en EU AI Act. Exporteer of verwijder al je data binnen 24 uur op verzoek.

Q: Kan Clyde meerdere merken tegelijk beheren?
A: Ja. Clyde is ontworpen voor multi-brand portfolios. Elk merk krijgt zijn eigen workspace met aparte merkstem, memory en goedkeuringsflow. De merken weten niets van elkaar.

Q: Welke platformen ondersteunt Clyde?
A: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn (social), WordPress en Webflow (blog), Google Ads en Meta Ads (ads), Calendly (lead qualifier), Twilio (voice agent), ManyChat (DM automation), en alle gangbare rapportagetools via API.

Q: Hoe werkt de goedkeuringsflow?
A: Clyde genereert content autonoom. Jij of je klant reviewt via het dashboard, Slack of Telegram. Goedkeuren of afwijzen met commentaar. Clyde leert van elke review en past de volgende batch aan.

Q: Wat is het verschil tussen Founding en Growth?
A: Founding kost 997 EUR per maand met een levenslang vast tarief (rate lock for life), maximaal 10 plekken, directe toegang tot Daley via Slack, en prioriteit bij nieuwe vaardigheden. Growth is 499 euro per workspace per maand voor bureaus die flexibiliteit willen zonder rate lock. Beide zijn maandelijks opzegbaar.

Q: Kan ik FutureMarketingAI eerst uitproberen?
A: Er is geen gratis trial. Wel is er een eerlijk strategiegesprek van 30 minuten voordat je betaalt. Als de match er niet is, zeggen we dat direct. Het aanvraagproces is vrijblijvend.
